title: CCRH Notification 2026 - Walk - in interview for 05 Yoga Therapist Posts
description: The Central Council for Research in Homoeopathy (CCRH) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 05 Yoga Therapist Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Any Degree and Diploma can apply for the CCRH Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection...
